title: Communication
html:
Communication in Openfront allows players and nations to send each other emojis, predefined chat messages, and attack intents in order to plan for attack, defense, and ultimately the win.

Sending Emojis

Players can send emojis to other humans or nations. Emojis sent between humans has no effect on the game itself. Sending certain emojis to a nation can affect the relationship score with them:

Emoji Sent Score Change
🕊️, 🏳️, ❤️, 🥰, or 👏 +15 (easy mode only)
🤡 -10
🖕 -100

Emojis Sent by Nations

The table below lists game events to which a nation might respond with an emoji, and the possible emojis they might send. Note that a nation is not guaranteed to send an emoji in response to an event; many of them have a random chance of being sent, and they're limited to sending emojis no faster than once per 300 ticks.

Response Causal Event Possible Emoji Responses
Overwhelmed Being MIRVed 💀🆘😱🥺😭😞🫡👋
Under attack by overwhelming forces
Unimpressed Attacked by a human with a tiny force ❓🤡🥱
Congratulations A team or human player wins 👏
Brag A nation controls the most tiles 👑🥇💪
Charm allies Sent occasionally to a human ally ❤️😊🥰🤝😇💪
Annoy traitors Sent occasionally to a non-friendly human traitor 🤡
Taunt the pipsqueak A human player owns less than 1% of the total land area after 10 minutes 🐀
Hello During the first minute of the game 👋
Insulted Received 🖕 🖕😡🤡😞😭
Confused Received 🤡 ❓🤡
Received 🕊️, 🏳️, ❤️, 🥰, or 👏 when relationship is bad
Rejected alliance request from traitor
Rejected alliance request because relationship bad
Love Received 🕊️, 🏳️, ❤️, 🥰, or 👏 when relationship is neutral or better ❤️😊🥰
Received gold donation worth at least 50 relationship points
Received troop donation large enough to improve relationship
Accepted alliance request because you are a threat
OK Received gold donation worth more than 0 relationship points but less than 50 👍
Too small Received gold or troop donation too small to improve relationship ❓🥱
Warship retaliation Retaliated to trade/transport ship being destroyed by building warship ⛵
Nuke Fired a nuke ☢️💥
Scared Offered alliance request because you are a threat 🙏🥺
Handshake Offered or accepted alliance request because relationship is good 🤝
We're not friends Refused assistance request because relationship is bad 🥱🤦‍♂️
Are you kidding? Refused assistance request because target is self 🥺💀
Won't attack allies Refused assistance request because target is ally 🕊️👎
I will assist Accepted assistance request 👍🤝🎯
Aggressive attack Attacked human while relations are good (probably attacked first) 😈
Attack Attacked human while relations are not good (probably retaliating) 😡

title: Content creators
html:
Just like the links Masterpost, this page's purpose is to list all the OpenFront Content Creators.

There are different kinds or stages of Content Creators within the OpenFront community, each "rank" getting the same perks as the previous one:

  1. Content Creator - They have the Content Creator role in the discord, and immediate image perms (coming with level 3 for other people), they can post in the OpenFront Content channel to promote themselves.
  2. Affiliates - They access the Content Creator channel and can officially cast the different events and tournaments, they also get an all skins access (even though they're obviously not allowed to wear the custom skins, as they're meant to be used by their buyer/customer only)
  3. Partners - Biggest Content Creators, they have a lot of followers and a big community, they also get the opportunity to have their own skin shop

- In order to apply for the Content Creator role, You need 2k views on OpenFront related videos or more than 1000 followers on a streaming site. (multiple video views can be stacked). Once you're eligible, feel free to open a ticket or contact a member of the staff to claim your role !

  • Biffeur: Swiss/French Partner content creator, active on Twitch and Youtube, head of [BGS] clan.
  • Camera: English speaking content creator, active on Youtube, part of [UN] clan.
  • CG: American content creator, active on Twitch and Youtube.
  • Danielsan: Spanish content creator, active on Twitch and Youtube.
  • Dannos: English speaking content creator, active on Youtube.
  • Deshack: Italian content creator, active on Twitch and Youtube (EN)/ Youtube (ITA) , part of [ITA] clan.
  • Enzo Plays: English Partner, active on Youtube.
  • Finnish Knight: Finnish content creator, active on Youtube.
  • Fulayon85: French Affiliate, active on Twitch and Youtube.
  • FuzeIII: French content creator, active on Twitch and Youtube.
  • Geko: American content creator, active on Youtube.
  • Happy G@mer: Dutch content creator, active on Youtube.
  • IBN: French content creator.
  • JIZK: French Affiliate, active on Twitch, Head of [JK] clan.
  • KaddiTV: German content creator, active on Twitch and Youtube.
  • Leecros: English speaking content creator, active on Youtube.
  • Lonely Millennial: English speaking Affiliate, active on Twitch and Youtube, head of [ROYS] clan.
  • Lumii: Serbian content creator, active on Youtube.
  • Lund: Norwegian content creator, active on Twitch and Youtube.
  • Mehigh Plays: American Affiliate, active on Twitch and Youtube, part of [MARS] clan.
  • MizuUmi: Japanese content creator, active on Youtube.
  • Molky: French Partner, active on Twitch and Youtube, head of [MOL] clan.
  • Node: French content creator, active on Twitch and Youtube.
  • Papi Flex: Canadian content creator, active on Youtube, head of [OO] clan.
  • RuddyBuddy: Canadian content creator, active on Twitch and Youtube.
  • Skailex: French content creator, active on Youtube, part of [LBU] clan.
  • Swiss_Person: Swiss content creator, active on Youtube.
  • The Spiffing Brit: British content creator, active on Youtube.
  • Ultimus Rex: American Partner, active on Twitch and Youtube, part of [UN] clan
  • Vamp1r: Tunisian/Brazilian content creator.
  • Vari: British content creator, active on Youtube, part of [LUX] clan
  • Z3RO: American content creator, active on Youtube, part of [UN] clan
  • Zixer: Canadian content creator, active on Twitch and Youtube.

title: Links Masterpost
html:
This Masterpost is here as a list of every useful link concerning OpenFront.

Main links : These links are available from the main site.

Discord Server This link leads to the main OpenFront Server, you're probably already in it, that's where most of the information is transmitted and where you can easily contact the staff and ask for help/advices or have suggestions/feedback. Also the place to join if you want to help with the cosmetics, the UI or the UX.

GitHub The link to the game's GitHub main page. As you may already know, OpenFront is an opensource game, meaning that anyone can access the code and submit their contribution to the game, by doing so you access to the Contributor role on the discord server mentionned above along with the Dev discord server. You also gain a free contributor skin that way thus deleting all ads!

OpenFront's Wiki That's where you currently are! The wiki is in constant evolution and may not be perfectly updated, look below to contribute to the wiki by joining the OpenFront Wiki Project.

OpenFront's Reddit That's where you can interact with a smaller part of the community.

Different discord servers related to openfront : Two of these servers are Officials, while the rest is community projects.

OpenFront Dev One of the 2 Official servers, it is for devs, staff, content creators and translators.

OpenFront Masters server The first and only official OpenFront.io tournament organization. By entering this server, you can access the competitive scene and thus the tournaments plannings while also registering for the future tournaments with your clan!

Openfront Hub The OpenFront Hub is a community-driven server built by OpenFront players, for OpenFront players. The goal is to create a central place for community initiatives, shared information, and collaborative projects. Events, initiatives, and the OpenFront Awards 2025 were just the beginning and more things are to come as The Hub grows.

OpenFront Wiki Project server This wiki's server, this is where to go if you need to report an error, ask questions, suggest something, etc...

Openfront Translation server Official Translation Server for OpenFront.io. This is where you can report translation misspellings or add a language. When contributing enough to gain the proofreader role, you also gain a Translator role on the main server and a Translator skin in your inventory, thus deleting all ads!

Affiliate shops : Additional shops for OpenFront content creators, who get a share of the skins bought in their shop.

Ultimus Rex's shop: Rex

Biffeur's shop: Biffeur

FuzeIII's shop: Fuze

EnzoPlays's shop: Enzo

Molky's shop: Molky

UN clan's shop: UN

Other variants and links for the game : These are sometimes used by the content creators for their videos.

https://main.openfront.dev/: One of the devs variants, where the devs try things sometimes.

https://nightly.openfront.dev/: Another dev variant, often used by content creators to test the upcoming updates features.

https://beta.openfront.io/: Where Evan, Lewis and Nebula (admins) host the playtests before launching a new version of the game.

https://trade3.openfront.dev/: This site doesn't have a cap on economy and tradeships (trade and trade2 don't work anymore for cloudflare reasons).

Disclaimer for the two following websites: They should only be used when there's trouble or someone knows what they're doing, it is advised to not use them

https://blue.openfront.io/: One of the two sites used for smooth updates, so the players don't have their game stop in the middle.

https://green.openfront.io/: The other site used for smooth updates.

Other links :

Steam: The OpenFront Steam release is planned for 2026, make sure to have it on your wishlist.

https://openfront-tools.frozenpenguin.media/: Thanks to Flopenguin you can now watch the replay of any game, no matter the version it was played on (as long as you have the game url/game ID of course), it also allows you to test a solo game in any past version.

OFstats: This site lets you see many information and statistics about players, clans and maps. You can keep track of your progress, but keep in mind that the site only takes into account the name of the player, not the player ID, the stats will be wrong if many people use the same name!

Map Making: Here lies information about how to make maps for the game.

Patreon : There is a Patreon were you can subscribe to support the game and get a pretty badge on the discord server!

Atlas: This website allows you to get additional information on maps, such as Nations spawns

Twitch: The Twitch account of Lewis (director), where some community events are hosted, some beta playtests and sometimes tournaments.

Youtube: The official OpenFront Youtube account.

OpenFront Lobbies : A way to know what lobby will appear next.

title: Unofficial Projects
html:
Unofficial community projects utilize Openfront data or interact with the Openfront systems.

The Openfront Api provides endpoints to query game, player, and clan data: you can list game metadata within a two-day window, fetch full game details, and retrieve player info and session lists by player ID; clan endpoints include a top-100 leaderboard (weighted wins with a 30-day half-life) and detailed clan stats and sessions over optional time ranges

For Software and Tools related to maps, see Map Making.

Note that some of these projects may be work in progress, incomplete, or abandoned.

Web Apps

OpenFront.io Replay Analyzer

A Web Application to analyze OF games

  • ofra.vimacs.workers.dev
  • Author: scamiv
  • Version: v28

FrontPlus.io

FrontPlus.io is a companion web platform for OpenFront.io players.

  • https://frontplus.io/

Software

All software linked below is community-created and not official in any capacity. Use at your own risk. Always review any code you download before running it.

OpenfrontIO Api Client (JS/TS)

An unofficial, robust JavaScript/TypeScript client for the OpenFront API.

  • Github
  • Author: Tidwell
  • Version: v28

Openfront Utility

This project is a tool for generating and previewing Openfront.io patterns in Base64 format.

  • Github
  • Author: Aotumuri
  • Version: v28

Openfront Tactical Suitcase

Monorepo for the Openfront Tactical Suitcase project, including the web UI, shared game logic, and a browser userscript HUD.

  • Github
  • Author: DrZoid
  • Version: v28

OpenFront Replay Analyzer

This repository runs OpenFront replays against the exact game engine version recorded in each replay’s gitCommit, without embedding the analyzer inside the main OpenFront repo.

  • Github
  • Author: scamiv
  • Version: v28

OpenFront.io Reinforcement Learning Agent

Academic Research project for a sophisticated deep reinforcement learning system for training AI agents to play OpenFront.io.

  • Github
  • Author: Terry, Jordan K and Black, Benjamin and Jayakumar, Mario
  • Version: v27

OpenFront Watcher Chrome Extension

A Chrome extension that monitors openfront.io for "Free for All" in the online mode rotation and sends desktop notifications.

  • Github
  • Author: PeanutButte7
  • Version: v28


Tools related to automating/cheating, gameplay modification, or forks of the Official OpenfrontIO game are not to be included here. Inactive software/tools will be flagged as inactive when they cease to function. If you verify software working on a more recent version than listed here, please contribute an update!
